bead.title: server/graphql: migrate StartWorker resolver to LoadAndResolve + behavioral e2e
bead.description:
Stage 1 of SD-024. Migrates the GraphQL StartWorker resolver at cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008.go:77 to use config.LoadAndResolve. Without this bead the GraphQL surface remains a bypass.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008.go (around line 77 — StartWorker)
- cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008_e2e_test.go (new) — TestReviewRetryThresholdFromConfigGraphQL

Out-of-scope:
- CLI dispatch (bead 7)
- Server worker dispatch (bead 8)

Depends on bead 6.5.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go test -run TestReviewRetryThresholdFromConfigGraphQL ./internal/server/graphql/... passes. cd cli && go test ./... passes.
